narrative:
Monroe 8 (precinct in Butler County) has 929 registered voters, with 58.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.2 percentage points.
